name: Hot Stuffed Avocado
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the outside of the peeled avocados in lemon juice to keep color.
2. Place in a large baking pan.
3. Sprinkle with lemon juice and garlic powder.
4. Melt butter; add green onions, celery salt, and cayenne pepper.
5. Cook for 5 minutes.
6. Blend in flour.
7. Add cream. Cook while stirring until thickened.
8. Fold in chicken and half the cheese.
9. Bake avocados at 350°F for 15 minutes.
10. Remove to serving plates. Ladle filling over avocados.
11. Top with remaining cheese.
